title: Veppam Kulir Mazhai
description: The story revolves around Petthaperumal and Paandi in the village of Maaviduthukotai, Sivangangai. They both are a happily married couple for some time until the pressure of conceiving a baby falls on them and thereafter affect their emotional and physical bond. The societal stigma of not conceiving a baby is thrust on a woman. The fake masculine identity crisis thrust on a man. How as a married couple they overcome the society burden of back biting and the shame through various pressures from the closed circles to the outer circle. The heat cold and finally the rain of love unfolds in this movie Veppam Kulir Mazhai.
